title: PythonLanguageType
content:
# PythonLanguageType

Inherits from: KSDKModel


## Methods


### app_file_system_name() -> str


### get_flavour() -> Optional[ApplicationFlavour]


### requirements_file_path(app_dir_path: KPath) -> Optional[KPath]

When provided with an application dir, yield the complete requirements.txt absolute file path


### requirements_available(app_dir_path: KPath) -> Tuple[bool, Optional[KPath]]

Indicates whether requirements are available within the requirements.txt file
